# Yuchen Water

> Public product facts and navigation for search and answer tools.

## Contact

- Website: https://www.yuchensy.com/
- Email: expresswater025@gmail.com
- Telephone and WhatsApp: +86-19908311885
- Location: Yuanhua Town, Haining, Zhejiang, China

## Product categories

- Water filter cartridges
- Water filter housings
- Reverse-osmosis water purifiers and treatment equipment
- Water dispensers

## Latvian filter-housing pages

- Product family: https://www.yuchensy.com/lv/product-housing-filter.html
  - 10-inch and 20-inch cartridge lengths
  - Slim and Big Blue/Jumbo housing formats
  - Blue, black and transparent housing variants
  - Single-, two- and three-stage configurations
  - Wall bracket or floor-frame configurations
  - Pressure gauge, housing wrench and installation accessories confirmed per order
- Filter-housing category: https://www.yuchensy.com/lv/filter-housing.html
- Three-stage Big Blue system: https://www.yuchensy.com/lv/product-big-blue-3stage.html

## Accuracy note

The published scope is limited to the listed housing sizes, formats, colors, stage
options, mounting choices and selectable accessories. Confirm the exact model,
quantity, packaging and destination before quotation.
